items.title: Why Guardiola's legacy could exceed the likes of Ferguson, Wenger, Klopp
items.summary: Exit as a Premier League champion like Sir Alex Ferguson? Or leave behind a strong foundation like Jurgen Klopp? Pep Guardiola has the chance to do both.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Astros vs. Guardians prediction, odds, time: 2026 MLB picks for Tuesday, April 21 from proven model
items.summary: SportsLine's model simulated the Houston Astros vs. Cleveland Guardians 10,000 times and revealed its MLB picks for Tuesday's matchup
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Hauger-Thackery runs Boston Marathon at 22 weeks pregnant
items.summary: Great Britain's Calli Hauger-Thackery finishes the Boston Marathon in two hours, 43 minutes and 58 seconds while five months pregnant.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
